rows.label: qev070201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Theeeere you are!! I finally found you!
Man, I was looking everywhere for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Listen! I got a message
from Doc, who was supposed to
have returned to the future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0003
rows.name:
It sounds like he's asking for help, but
there's nothing I can do about it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0004
rows.name:
This is one of Doc's inventions. It's
a device that sends messages directly
to a specified person's brain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0005
rows.name:
It really startled me when it
suddenly warped right in front
of my eyes a little while ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0006
rows.name:
Well... just hearing me talk about
it probably won't click for you,
so let's play it back right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Ah, this message is encoded so
that only Veven and [ST:playername ] can access it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Therefore, absolutely do not tell anyone
else about what you are hearing now. There
are still people targeting me, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmm... Now then, let's get to the main
point. I am currently on Great Washington
Isle in the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, you'll understand the
situation if you come, but
anyway, I need you to save me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hurry up! I have to return to NLA as
soon as possible and research the
anomalies surrounding this planet Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0012
rows.name:
It seems this space is... a much more
troublesome place than we thought...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0013
rows.name: Hm...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Oh! The prey is here! So that's
how it is, I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hey... How was it? Did
you hear Doc's voice?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev070201_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod and say you heard it.

rows.label: qev070201_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070201_SEL0041
rows.name:
Feign ignorance and ask what it
said, since you heard nothing.

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Good... So, about the place
Doc mentioned, I don't think
I can make it there myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Eh, really!? I heard it loud and
clear though... That's so weird...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Well, whatever, I'll explain it simply. It
seems Doc is currently on Great Washington
Isle in the Valley of Oblivion, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0035
rows.name:
It looks like he got caught up in some
trouble. So, Doc is asking us for help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0036
rows.name:
...But, about the place Doc
mentioned, I don't think someone
like me can make it there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0020
rows.name:
So, I want you to go and save
Doc. You see, there are a lot of
things I want to ask him too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Doc, who was supposed to have returned
to the future... aren't you curious
why he's in a place like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Alright! Then please
bring Doc back safely![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'll be cleaning up the lab
so that Doc can start his
research anytime he gets back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0024
rows.name:
I thought we wouldn't see him for a while,
but to think we'd reunite so soon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Hehe, it feels a bit
anticlimactic, doesn't it.
Honestly, Doc is just impossible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hey... Did something happen
to Doc? He's been spacing out
ever since he got back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Hmm... Did he eat something weird
in the Valley of Oblivion?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0028
rows.name:
He told me we're doing important
research from now on, so I have to
camp out at the lab and help him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Doc seems really fired up, saying we'll
be researching overnight for a while...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Yeah... Things have definitely
gotten pretty interesting.[ST:wait ]
